conformal_semantics.score_definition: Pre-period absolute residuals |Y_{j,t} - Y_hat_{j,t}| calibrated against treated-period |Y_{j,T} - Y_hat_{j,T}|; one-sided p-value via rank in pre-period empirical distribution (conformal.py).
conformal_semantics.exchangeability_assumption: Pre-treatment residual magnitudes are exchangeable with treated-period residuals under the null; fragile under spillover, donor composition shifts, or post-fit structural breaks.
conformal_semantics.residual_source_units: Level outcomes on the treated unit path — same y/y_hat scale as AugSynthCVXPY results after percent-effect injection on the post window.
conformal_semantics.exchangeability_caveat: AUDIT-010 A05 / Track F F-OD-001 — do not treat as governed uncertainty unless interval semantics pass on OC battery.

fidelity_caveats.summary: D1 scm_pre_rmse uses SciPy SyntheticControl, not inner SyntheticControlCVXPY.
penalty/penalty_strength stored on AugSynthCVXPY but unused on OSQP SCM path.
OC uses level mean_point_effect; summary() uses relative effect estimand.
Hull stress uses z-distance proxy, not true convex hull membership.

config.n_mc_reduction_reason: 19-world conformal failure grid runtime; harness default n_mc=8 for replay

conformal_semantics.exchangeability_caveat: AUDIT-010 A05 / Track F F-OD-001 — do not treat as governed uncertainty unless interval semantics pass on OC battery.

conformal_semantics.score_definition: Pre-period absolute residuals |Y_{j,t} - Y_hat_{j,t}| calibrated against treated-period |Y_{j,T} - Y_hat_{j,T}|; one-sided p-value via rank in pre-period empirical distribution (conformal.py).

residual_exchangeability_failure: pre-period residual calibration pool mismatched to post-period scale
weak_prefit_poor_calibration_set: good_prefit safer than poor_prefit — diagnostic-conditioned failure

failure_mechanisms.conformal_semantics_note: Pre-treatment residual magnitudes are exchangeable with treated-period residuals under the null; fragile under spillover, donor composition shifts, or post-fit structural breaks.

findings.summary: Conformal failure battery on 19 worlds (n_mc=4) after ASCM-003 and JK calibration.
Mean conformal null FPR: 0.013888888888888888; severe worlds (>=0.5): 0; concerning (>=0.35): 0.
Conformal/A26 mean half-width ratio: 60.49729542103188; over-wide interval rate: 0.2236842105263158.
n_mc=4; 19-world conformal failure grid runtime; harness default n_mc=8 for replay
Null FPR low (0.013888888888888888) but intervals unusably wide (HW ratio 60.5 vs A26).
